# Jsonpath user (json payload parse)

**Dataset**: `gx_04_raw_json` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Parse JSON-in-text payload fields with json_extract_scalar / json_extract_array. Jsonpath user.

```sql
dataset = gx_04_raw_json | alter usr = json_path_extract(payload, "$.user"), act = json_path_extract(payload, "$.action") | fields src, usr, act | limit 20
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 9). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
